narrative:
Liberty Union-Thurston Local Sd (Fairfield) school district has 5,265 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.8 percentage points.
